eligible_treatments.rationale: standard reminder outreach is in range for this delinquency band
consumer may be offered the option to schedule a promise-to-pay date
DPD >= 30 and disclosed monthly surplus 200.0 > 0 supports an indicative short-term plan
vulnerability/hardship context present — hardship treatment eligible for specialist consideration
offer a referral to a non-profit credit-counseling agency given hardship/vulnerability context
route to a hardship/vulnerable-customer specialist for enhanced-care handling

outreach_plan.cadence_note: phone attempts remaining under the 7-in-7d presumption: 4; observe quiet-hours (local 8:00-21:00) before any call
outreach_plan.tone: supportive, non-pressuring, hardship-aware; lead with available options and specialist support

care_prompts: Confirm and record the vulnerability/hardship context with consent before acting.
Offer specialist support and, where useful, a non-profit credit-counseling referral.
Do not treat disclosed hardship as an adverse decision input; avoid stigmatizing language.
disclaimer: Recommendations and evidence only; every treatment option and outreach action requires human adjudication and authorization. No collections decision has been made, no case has been closed, and no system of record has been updated.
narrative: Treatment planning for account ****4521 (credit_card) at 45 days past due places the account in the Mid delinquency band. Two vulnerability indicators are on file (recent job loss; hardship declared), so this case is routed for enhanced-care handling and a hardship/vulnerable-customer specialist should lead. No suppression flags are present, so outreach is permitted; 3 phone attempts were made in the trailing 7 days, leaving 4 within the 7-in-7 call-frequency presumption, so a further call may be considered within quiet hours. Options presented for reviewer consideration, each with a policy citation, are: payment_reminder, promise_to_pay, payment_arrangement (indicative, disclosed monthly surplus 200.0), hardship_forbearance, external_credit_counseling_referral, and specialist_referral. Due-date change, re-age review, and settlement referral are not in range at this delinquency band and are shown as ineligible with the rule missed. These are recommendations for a specialist to weigh with the customer; affordability figures are indicative and are not a credit or affordability determination. Recommendations and evidence only; every treatment option and outreach action requires human adjudication and authorization. No collections decision has been made, no case has been closed, and no system of record has been updated.
